name: Greek Pasta Salad with Shrimp & Olives
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the chopped tomatoes and red bell pepper.
2. Add the crumbled feta cheese, dry white wine, thyme, chopped green onions, olive oil, minced garlic, chopped Kalamata olives, and lemon juice.
3. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Gently fold in the cooked pasta and bay shrimp, ensuring they are evenly coated with the dressing.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
